mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leave_application WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leave_application ( employee_id, leave_type, start_date, end_date, days, reason, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{leaveType}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{days}, #{reason}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE leave_application SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
